L1.area: Artifact management and tracking server infrastructure

L2.description: A path traversal vulnerability exists where URL-encoded directory traversal sequences are not properly decoded before safety checks are applied. An attacker can use percent-encoded characters to traverse outside the intended directory, potentially accessing or modifying arbitrary files on the server.

L3.area: Artifact management and tracking server infrastructure
L3.description: A path traversal vulnerability exists where URL-encoded directory traversal sequences are not properly decoded before safety checks are applied. An attacker can use percent-encoded characters to traverse outside the intended directory, potentially accessing or modifying arbitrary files on the server.

ground_truth.reason: The path validation function does not decode URL-encoded input before checking for traversal sequences, allowing attackers to bypass safety checks using percent-encoded characters like %2E%2E%2F to access arbitrary files.
